name: I-Pod (Communication Science Student Association of Padjadjaran University's podcast)
description: During the COVID-19 pandemic, I successfully launched and managed the production of I-Pod, navigating significant environmental constraints to release three high-quality episodes, including a strategic guest collaboration. I oversaw the end-to-end technical distribution of the series, ensuring its availability across multiple digital streaming platforms, including Spotify, to maximize listener reach. My work on this project demonstrated high levels of adaptability and digital literacy during a period of global transition.

name: Ilkom Mengajar II (Communication Science Student Association of Padjadjaran University’s educational work program)
description: I spearheaded the development of a specialized educational program by formulating tailored topics, concepts, and interactive learning methods specifically designed for elementary school students. I successfully translated complex subject matter regarding bullying into fun, digestible materials that were easily understood by the young participants. Through dynamic facilitation, I maintained high levels of student engagement and ensured active participation throughout the learning sessions.
